title: volutarella
intro: Volutarella is a type of plant that belongs to the family of borage, and it is commonly known as the borage plant. The medicinal properties of Volutarella include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA). The health benefits of consuming Volutarella include reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and promoting brain function. Volutarella can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or oil form, or it can be added to food as a culinary herb.
